name: add_memory
description: Store a new preference, fact, or conversation snippet. Requires at least one: user_id, agent_id, or run_id.

text.description: Plain sentence summarizing what to store. Required even if `messages` is provided.

messages.description: Structured conversation history with `role`/`content`. Use when you have multiple turns.

user_id.description: Override the default user scope for this write.

metadata.description: Attach arbitrary metadata JSON to the memory.

enable_graph.description: Set true only if the caller explicitly wants Mem0 graph memory.

name: search_memories

query.description: Natural language description of what to find.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

enable_graph.description: Set true only when the user explicitly wants graph-derived memories.

name: get_memories

enable_graph.description: Set true only if the caller explicitly wants graph-derived memories.

name: delete_all_memories
description: Delete every memory in the given user/agent/app/run but keep the entity.

user_id.description: User scope to delete; defaults to server user.

name: list_entities
description: List which users/agents/apps/runs currently hold memories.

name: get_memory
description: Fetch a single memory once you know its memory_id.

name: delete_memory
description: Delete one memory after the user confirms its memory_id.

name: delete_entities
description: Remove a user/agent/app/run record entirely (and cascade-delete its memories).

user_id.description: Delete this user and its memories.

agent_id.description: Delete this agent and its memories.

app_id.description: Delete this app and its memories.

run_id.description: Delete this run and its memories.
